2288760.name: Night Run
2288760.description:
Ride your motorcycle at high speed and weave through autonomous vehicles in an endless art filled cyberpunk night time city.

Ride fast through checkpoints to increase your combo and multiply your score by up 99X and compete across 2048 uniquely generated tracks each with their own online leaderboards.

Race your favorite seed again and again to get the highest score, play on a different series of random runs every day or compete for the highest score of the day in Daily Run mode.

Vibe to a unique underground electronic music soundtrack with tracks from:

- Eden FM
- Matt Shadetek
- DJ Planet Express
- Assiye Bongzin
- no_4mat
- Subjoi
- LeloWhatsGood
- Almost Miami
- Nørus
- DJ Maybe

Unlock achievements as you play. Look at thousands of pieces of beautiful generative art in the background and loading screens as you ride and vibe.
